title: Review R5: jmap-chat-egui convergence check
notes: Confidence: 90%. P0=0 P1=1. CONVERGED: no. One real P1: auto-mark-read logic duplicated in SelectChat and SendMessage handlers with diverging retry behavior vs MarkRead handler. Three P4 doc gaps filed (.2, .3, .4): full_reload_chats missing when-to-call doc, read_positions staleness on new-chat SSE path undocumented, AppState cache-consistency invariant only on chat_display not chats. All P4s have engineering basis; none are opinion. Out of real complaints after these four. Remaining blocker: P1 .1 refactor.
